about: Report a reproducible bug in VolunteerIQ

labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include screenshots or screen recordings if applicable. -->

## Console Output / Error Messages

```
Paste any relevant browser console errors or Next.js server logs here.
```

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| **Browser** | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17 |
| **OS** | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| **Node.js version** | e.g. 18.20.0 |
| **VolunteerIQ version / commit** | e.g. v0.5.0 or commit SHA |
| **User role** | Coordinator / Volunteer / Guest |
| **Page affected** | e.g. `/dashboard`, `/map`, `/api/triage` |

## Affected Component

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Landing page
- [ ] Authentication (login / signup)
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Report Issue form
- [ ] Volunteer Portal
- [ ] AI Insights
- [ ] Map View
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] API route (`/api/...`)
- [ ] Firestore integration
- [ ] Gemini AI integration
- [ ] WhatsApp dispatch
- [ ] Middleware / route protection
- [ ] Other: ___

## Severity

- [ ] 🔴 **Critical** — data loss, security issue, or complete feature broken
- [ ] 🟠 **High** — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 **Medium** — feature partially broken, workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 **Low** — cosmetic issue or minor inconvenience

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context about the bug — e.g. does it happen consistently or intermittently? Only with specific data? After a specific user action? -->

## Possible Fix

<!-- Optional: If you have a hypothesis on what's causing the bug or how to fix it, share it here. -->
